Smith, 2022 Indiana Mr. Basketball, will continue to wear No. 3.

items.author: Fieldhouse Files
items.body_excerpt: The Indiana Fever suffered a 111-109 loss on Wednesday to the Phoenix Mercury, their second meeting in three games. Kelsey Mitchell scored a game-high 30 points before fouling out with 22 seconds left. The Fever (10-8) have allowed 100+ points in six of their eight losses this…

items.title: Asked Trent Redden what the Clippers have learned from picking in the second round so much lately: “I think you look about human characteristics a lot. When we’ve had success with guys, it’s guys we bet on as a human.” Redden mentioned Terance Mann, Amir Coffey, and Kobe Sanders.
